title: The Rise and Fall of a Tyrant: Hitler's Dark Reign

scenes.narration: In the aftermath of World War I, Germany faced economic ruin and political chaos.
scenes.subtitle: How a broken nation birthed a monster
scenes.image_prompt: Montage of 1920s Germany: rubble, starving citizens, and a young Hitler speaking at a crowded beer hall with intense lighting, gritty textures, muted color palette, wide-angle shot highlighting desperation

scenes.narration: Hitler exploited Germany's despair with fiery speeches promising national rebirth and scapegoating minorities.
scenes.subtitle: Propaganda and hatred fueled his ascent
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up of Hitler waving to a roaring crowd under floodlights, stark shadows, saturated colors, shallow depth of field emphasizing his charismatic yet menacing presence

scenes.narration: By 1933, Hitler became Chancellor, transforming democracy into a totalitarian nightmare.
scenes.subtitle: The press became a weapon of mass control
scenes.image_prompt: Burning books in Berlin streets at night, flickering flames casting long shadows, dramatic low-angle shot with smoke-filled air, desaturated colors with occasional red highlights

scenes.narration: Six million lives were extinguished in concentration camps as the world turned a blind eye.
scenes.subtitle: The world's deadliest genocide unfolded in plain sight
scenes.image_prompt: Black-and-white footage of Auschwitz's gate, long lens compression showing endless rows of barracks, somber stillness, cinematic chiaroscuro lighting with single shaft of sunlight piercing through clouds

scenes.narration: History repeats when we forget... Subscribe for more untold stories.
scenes.image_prompt: Dramatic slow-motion shot of war-torn Berlin skyline at dusk, golden hour lighting, handheld camera shake, distant thunder rumble, wide shot framing ruins with lone dove flying
